AUTHORIZATION_AUTHORITY: May convert validated risk decisions into authorization artifacts.
CERTIFICATION_AUTHORITY: May observe and certify, never create production authority.
CONSTITUTIONAL_OFFICE: Production office authority with lifecycle and artifact obligations.
EXTERNAL_AUTHORITY_ADAPTER: Boundary adapter preserving external and internal authority identity.
INFORMATION_ONLY_OFFICE: Receives or emits immutable information without workflow ownership.
RECOVERY_AUTHORITY: May restore evidence-backed state without fabricating authority.
SERVICE_AUTHORITY: Service authority without independent workflow ownership.
TRUTH_PRODUCER: May create authoritative truth records within declared provenance scope.
UNRESOLVED_AUTHORITY: Authority not yet safe for readiness credit.
WORKFLOW_OWNER: May hold or transfer Workflow Execution Tokens within explicit scope.
